case_title: WESLEY, LEE C/O SAMANTHA LIAPES VS SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESLEY, LEE C/O SAMANTHA LIAPES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT MAYER, TIMOTHY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, POLICE OFFICER STAR #1780 IS AMENDED TO: TIMOTHY MAYER. WILLIE BROWN, MAYOR OF SAN FRANCISCO AND FRED LAU, CHIEF OF POLICE ARE DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR SELECTED PARTY (DEFENDANT: SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPT) FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESLEY, LEE C/O SAMANTHA LIAPES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT MAYER, TIMOTHY JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26542 ON 5-3-01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WESLEY, LEE C/O SAMANTHA LIAPES AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT MAYER, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDANCE FROM PLTF LEE WESLEY FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT MAYER, TIMOTHY
